mapper.sql: id, bill_no, organ_type, organ_id, organ_name, begin_time, end_time, total_amount, is_paid, pay_time, is_invoiced, invoice_code, invoice_time, creator, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time, remark, template_id, tenant_id, delete_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from jsh_reconciliation_head
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_reconciliation_head (bill_no, organ_type, organ_id, organ_name, begin_time, end_time, total_amount, is_paid, pay_time, is_invoiced, invoice_code, invoice_time, creator, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time, remark, template_id, tenant_id, delete_flag) values (#{billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{totalAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isPaid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into jsh_reconciliation_head
bill_no,
organ_type,
organ_id,
organ_name,
begin_time,
end_time,
total_amount,
is_paid,
pay_time,
is_invoiced,
invoice_code,
invoice_time,
creator,
create_time,
last_update_by,
last_update_time,
remark,
template_id,
tenant_id,
delete_flag,

mapper.update:
update jsh_reconciliation_head
bill_no = #{record.billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_type = #{record.organType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_id = #{record.organId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_name = #{record.organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
begin_time = #{record.beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{record.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
total_amount = #{record.totalAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
is_paid = #{record.isPaid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pay_time = #{record.payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_invoiced = #{record.isInvoiced,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_code = #{record.invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_time = #{record.invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_update_by = #{record.lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
last_update_time = #{record.lastUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
template_id = #{record.templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_flag = #{record.deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update jsh_reconciliation_head set bill_no = #{record.billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organ_type = #{record.organType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organ_id = #{record.organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organ_name = #{record.organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, begin_time = #{record.beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{record.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, total_amount = #{record.totalAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, is_paid = #{record.isPaid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pay_time = #{record.payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_invoiced = #{record.isInvoiced,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_code = #{record.invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_time = #{record.invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_update_by = #{record.lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_update_time = #{record.lastUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, template_id = #{record.templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_flag = #{record.deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update jsh_reconciliation_head
bill_no = #{billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_type = #{organType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_id = #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_name = #{organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
begin_time = #{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
is_paid = #{isPaid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pay_time = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_invoiced = #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_code = #{invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_time = #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
template_id = #{templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update jsh_reconciliation_head set bill_no = #{billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organ_type = #{organType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organ_id = #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organ_name = #{organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, begin_time = #{beginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, is_paid = #{isPaid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pay_time = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_invoiced = #{isInvoiced,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_code = #{invoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_time = #{invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, template_id = #{templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
